handoff.summary: Visual polish applied: palette consolidation (12 room + 6 avatar + 6 status + 6 shell-chrome CSS custom properties), VS Code theme integration (dark/light/high-contrast via vscode-* body classes and CSS variable fallbacks), animation easing refined to ease-in-out, prefers-reduced-motion compliance at both CSS media-query and JS levels, focus indicators using --focus-ring everywhere, font-size minimum raised to 10px, contain: layout paint on room/desk/avatar for repaint isolation, loading and empty state visual treatment.

notes: All changes are visual-only refinements. No data model, message protocol, or feature changes. The room's decorative pixel-art palette (12 colors) stays fixed across themes; only the shell chrome (hud, legend, viewport frame, body background) adapts to VS Code's theme via CSS variable fallbacks.
